The '''Battle of Nomlis III''' was a conflict between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] that took place in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]. It resulted in the destruction of the [[Bretie Facility]].

==Overview==
During the year [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] [[Liberty/Legends|''Liberty'']] was conducting an operation to investigate the Empire's activities behind the recently-discovered [[TIE Experimental Project]]. The Empire had been fielding a series of new TIE starfighters that were being used to raid and harass civilian convoys. It was suspected that the Empire intended to field these new fighters against the Alliance, so the disruption of this project became a top priority for the Alliance.

During their investigation, the Rebels discovered that the starfighters were being researched and developed at an installation called the ''[[Bretie Facility]]'', orbiting [[Nomlis III]] in the [[Kurdin system]]. It was found that the facility's databases contained sufficient data on the starfighters and their developers, so the Rebels launched an operation to raid the facility and steal all relevant data on the project.

==Battle==
Upon arriving in [[Nomlis III]] space, the four [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] from [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]], under the command of [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]], began an attack on the facility's [[Gun Emplacement|standard]] and [[Large Gun Emplacement|large gun emplacements]]. They moved on to destroy the station's supplies and the fleeing transports, which included a pair of [[Xiytiar-class heavy transport/Legends|Xiytiar-class transports]]. Meanwhile, [[Storm Unit (team)|Storm Unit]] used an [[Gamma-class ATR-6 assault transport|assault transport]] to board Bretie Facility under the cover of a pair of [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|A-wings]]. While the Rebel fighters continued to stave off [[TIE Experimental M1]]s and [[TIE Experimental M3|M3s]], Storm Unit fought their way to the central computer, retrieved all data pertaining to the [[TIE Experimental Project]], planted charges, then hurriedly made their escape. ''Bretie Facility'' was totally destroyed in the resulting blast, striking a major blow against the Empire's latest plans.

==Aftermath==
With the information obtained from the now destroyed Bretie Facility, the Rebels were able to uncover the location of [[XQ1 Platform|platform]] [[Obsidian (XQ1 Platform)|''Obsidian'']]—the home of the TIE Experimental Project. In retribution for this theft of valuable data, the Empire launched an assault on the [[MC80 Liberty Type Heavy Star Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] [[Liberty/Legends|''Liberty'']], to which the Rebel strike team had just returned.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
